channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Baddie Restaurant RNG Codes (June 2026)
item.content:encoded:
Use these Roblox My Baddie Restaurant monthly redeem codes to get your hands on plenty of free rewards, including and much more.

My Baddie Restaurant is a restaurant management game on Roblox that throws players into the chaotic world of running their own dining establishment with quirky characters called Baddies. The game begins with a humorous twist—your restaurant has completely collapsed, leaving you with nothing but debt and determination. From this rocky start, players must rebuild their culinary empire by collecting Baddies through a dice-spinning mechanic, then putting these characters to work cooking dishes and serving customers to generate income.

The core gameplay revolves around strategic management and collection mechanics. Players spin dice to unlock new Baddies, with rarer variants offering faster cooking speeds and better customer tips. The game features progression systems including rebirth mechanics that unlock additional content and rewards, with certain codes requiring specific rebirth levels to redeem.

Since its release, My Baddie Restaurant has carved out its niche in the Roblox restaurant tycoon genre. While grinding through gameplay naturally provides resources for expansion, redeeming codes offers players a convenient shortcut to obtain extra spins and special potions that would otherwise require significant time investment or premium currency purchases.

Active Baddie Restaurant RNG Codes

  • BADDIE: 1 Spin (requires Rebirth level 3)
  • NewFloorsYay: 5 Spins (requires Rebirth level 13)
  • OneMoreSpin: 10 Spins

Expired Baddie Restaurant RNG Codes

  • BUTIMASTAR
  • RELEASE

How To Redeem Baddie Restaurant RNG Codes

Redeeming codes for My Baddie Restaurant is rather simple, much like most Roblox games. Here’s how:

  1. Launch My Baddie Restaurant in Roblox
  2. Find the Store on the far left of the screen
  3. Click Store, scroll down to the codes section and find the text box
  4. Type or paste a working code into the text box
  5. Click on “redeem” to claim your freebie

Where To Get more Baddie Restaurant RNG Codes

Finding active My Baddie Restaurant codes requires knowing where the developers actually communicate with their community. The game’s official Discord server is the primary hub where codes get announced, and YumYum! posts them directly in dedicated channels, often bundled with announcements about new features or gameplay adjustments. Joining the Discord gives you direct access to these announcements and lets you interact with fellow restaurant managers who share code discoveries they’ve found across different platforms.

Social media platforms serve as secondary distribution points for promotional codes. The developers use these channels to reward the community during special occasions; whether celebrating the game reaching popularity milestones, launching new Baddie types, or marking seasonal events. Codes typically appear without much advance notice and can vanish just as quickly, making it frustrating to stay on top of every potential source. Missing a code window means losing out on free spins or potions that could significantly boost your restaurant’s growth.

There’s a simpler approach, though. Bookmark this article and return periodically rather than juggling multiple social feeds and community servers. We update this resource whenever new codes become available, and we remove dead codes promptly so you’re only seeing currently functional redemptions.

Enjoying our Roblox games codes coverage? Check out the codes for popular games like Steal A Brainrot, Radiant Residents, and Fix It Up on Insider Gaming!

Interested in the latest developments in the world of gaming and esports? Then join the Insider Gaming Discord server and engage with the passionate community.

MOBILE APP

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The Biggest Winners and Losers of the IEM Cologne 2026 Major
item.content:encoded:
The IEM Cologne 2026 Major was an emotional, memorable, and record-breaking Counter-Strike event. For some, it will remain the best moments of their lives, for others, the worst.

Insider Gaming has a look back at the event to identify the biggest winners and the biggest losers of the first Major of the 2026 Counter-Strike calendar.

The IEM Cologne 2026 Major’s biggest winners

Every single member of Team Falcons

It goes without saying that Team Falcons are the biggest winners, but it would be a dereliction of duty not to point out that every single member of the Falcons roster, and its coach, had an incredible story to get there.

Nikola ‘NiKo’ Kovač’s story is, of course, the most extraordinary. Winning a major on the 17th time of asking, in new positions no less, is an incredible feat of perseverance and adaptability.

The veteran rifler told Insider Gaming after the victory, “I went through a lot in my career; people that follow me know how hard it was, how much I’ve suffered. There was a lot of pain; I lost a lot in my career, but today it feels like it was all worth it, all of that was a lesson, and all of that was leading up to something great.”

That is not to understate the impact of Finn ‘karrigan’ Andersen. karrigan’s FaZe failed to qualify for the Cologne Major, yet in the end, he lifted the trophy in an extraordinary run.

He did so by elevating every single other player in the roster, most notably Maksim ‘kyousuke’ Lukin, who had struggled in the playoffs before karrigan’s introduction. The 18-year-old came of age in Cologne, delivering huge impact and outfragging donk in the semis.

René ‘TeSeS’ Madsen also had huge moments when needed, finding more confidence in his crosshair of late. For Ilya ‘m0NESY’ Osipov, the risk of leaving G2 to rejoin NiKo has fully paid off, with an event MVP for the AWPer as well.

Perhaps most important for their legacy, Falcons coach, Danny ‘zonic’ Sørensen secured his record sixth Counter-Strike Major. The coach had been under pressure for the entire Falcons enterprise, which had only won one trophy before Cologne.

Alongside NiKo, the Danish former Astralis coach’s relief was perhaps the most palpable on stage as he returned to the top of the CS mountain.

9z & BetBoom

With the end of the tournament focusing on heavy-hitters like Falcons, FURIA, Spirit, Vitality, and G2, it might be hard to remember that the IEM Cologne 2026 Major had its fair share of fairytale runs.

None were more notable than the two relative minnows that made the Major playoffs: 9z and BetBoom.

BetBoom clawed their way from Stage 1 of the Major all the way to the playoffs. While the roster undoubtedly found the Lanxess too big a stage to replicate their earlier form, that makes their journey there no less remarkable.

Despite the absence of their starting rifler, Pavel ‘S1ren’ Ogloblin, IGL Kirill ‘Boombl4’ Mikhailov, and coach Artem ‘Fierce’ Ivanov, showed very composed and organized Counter-Strike to progress through the Swiss Stages.

As a result, the team has leapfrogged to the top 10 of the VRS, ensuring a plethora of Tier 1 invites for next season and dozens of chances for the roster to grow more on-stage experience. As the only roster to defeat Falcons in the Major, the roster’s potential cannot be dismissed.

9z will similarly get plenty of Tier 1 invites next season, sitting in the top 12 of the VRS after the Major. The Argentinian organization also showed a strong performance in the playoffs, pushing FURIA hard on stage.

Maximiliano ‘max’ Gonzalez called rings around FURIA on Dust 2, recreating his excellent mid-round calling in the Swiss stage, and Luciano ‘luchov’ Herrera announced himself as a true star at this Major.

The future is bright for 9z after this breakout event. The organization’s status as a Spanish-speaking South American roster also gives it the possibility of keeping the roster together for the long term. Folks on Polymarket believe there is a 32% chance of 9z making a roster change before September.

Counter-Strike Esports

During the playoffs, on July 19, Counter-Strike celebrated its 27th birthday; specifically, it was 27 years since the initial Counter-Strike beta. On the same day, G2 and Spirit played out one of the most unbelievable series in the history of the esport.

As if to act as a cherry on top of the birthday cake, Falcons and Vitality followed that up with an enthralling series that kept fans cheering in the Lanxess well past 01:00 local time. Both matches peaked at over 2 million viewers, as per data from Esports Charts.

The Grand Final went one step further, capturing 2,752,253 peak viewers according to Esports Charts, breaking the long-held PGL Stockholm 2021 Major peak, the first CS Major since the COVID pandemic.

The tournament also averaged a staggering 627,489 viewers through all stages for a total of 100,245,102 hours watched.

In contrast to other esports, where declining viewership is causing existential dread, there is very little fear that Counter-Strike will disappear any time soon.

While Counter-Strike may be 27-years-old, there’s life in the unc of esports yet.

The IEM Cologne 2026 Major’s biggest losers

Natus Vincere

NAVI went into the Major riding the high of defeating Vitality at IEM Atlanta, securing the trophy there to make a statement on the eve of the Major.

In the Major itself, the team never really got off the ground, struggling through every moment, eventually being eliminated by G2, finishing Stage 3 with a 2-3 record overall.

The roster was undoubtedly the second-best roster of the season overall, winning two trophies and securing runner-up finishes in Rotterdam and Fort Worth.

Despite that, all of NAVI’s win conditions fell by the wayside in Cologne, with their overall teamplay, which gave them such a high floor, completely missing, and their newfound win condition, Drin ‘makazze’ Shaqiri, suffering individually.

The failure to even make the playoffs suddenly wiped away a lot of the perceived progress that the roster had made over the last three months, erasing the positive community sentiment and instantly causing fans to call for roster changes.

That may be the only positive for NAVI, that their resistance to make roster changes may be overcome by the need to improve their Major showings.

After a 3rd/4th place in Budapest, NAVI decided to stick with their roster. After Cologne, the question NAVI must ask is whether Natus Vincere means ‘Born to Participate’ or whether it means ‘Born to Win.’ Bold action will be needed to ensure NAIV can keep up with the awesome firepower of this Falcons roster.

Astralis

Astralis’ Stage 2 exit should not have been a shock to anyone. Their form had been trending in that direction in the previous results leading up to the Major at BLAST Fort Worth and IEM Atlanta.

The roster seemed to lose faith completely in their existing structure and playstyle, performing well below what you would expect from their individuals.

That is not to say that this Astralis roster is its most star-studded. The roster was built to be a functional cooperation of pieces rather than star-driven, but even then, it fell below those modest expectations.

Astralis had to watch on as TeSeS, one of the few former Heroic roster members they did not sign, lifted the trophy. They also saw Gytis ‘ryu’ Glušauskas’s former Monte teammates progress to Stage 3 as Astralis languished in their 1-3 Stage 2 exit.

Coach Casper ‘ruggah’ Due has already fallen by the way side, losing his role in the roster, but it would be shocking if he were the last to go. After the sudden collapse of morale from Fort Worth onwards, one wonders what exactly is happening in this roster.

Liquid

Oh, Liquid, Liquid, Liquid. How do I fix you? Well, truth be told, I’m glad that’s not my decision to make.

Liquid were fortunate to be at the Major in the first place due to a region swap after securing Mario ‘malbsMD’ Samayoa. After signing the Guatemalan, they proceeded to almost make a mess of that particular gift horse, squeaking into the Major through the Americas VRS.

Liquid didn’t deserve to be at the Major, but surely, when you’re there, you make the most of it? On paper, this Liquid roster is still far better than the majority of Stage 1 teams. That advantage remained purely on paper, turning to dust in the server.

A Stage 1 elimination was all Liquid deserved, and all this roster deserves as a whole. Poor MalbsMD must be dismayed at what he walked into.

By contrast, NertZ, who joined G2 from Liquid in a swap for MalbsMD, made the playoffs and played out one of the best series in CS history in the quarter-finals.

When Insider Gaming asked NertZ if he was miserable at Liquid, he replied, “Maybe I thought there were different voices, too many voices in the team, that I should be trying to give some space for other people. And it may be it gave the effect of being miserable, frustrated, or depressed.”

The team’s structural issues still seem to remain despite changing players and their coach over the last year. It seems no matter the exact configuration, Liquid are abject.

The worst thing about the Liquid situation is the idea that Liquid might want to keep three of these players to maintain their ranking for future invites.

The cycle must be broken, the suffering must end, Liquid must disband! Please?

Maybe you think Team Vitality is one of the biggest losers. Certainly, a chance to complete a historic threepeat isn’t something that comes around every day. Insider Gaming explores Vitality’s run here, and why it might not be the worst loss in the end.

Let us know your IEM Cologne 2026 Major predictions on Insider Gaming’s Discord


For other news, see Gentle Mates leaving Counter-Strike and sign up to the Insider Gaming newsletter

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/iem-cologne-2026-major-biggest-winners-and-losers/
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: All GTA 6 Editions, Prices, Content Included & Pre-Order Bonuses
item.content:encoded:
Rockstar Games comes locked and loaded with different GTA 6 editions for you to agonize over, and you’ll need to decide if the extra content, prices, and more are all worth it.

2026 is the year of Grand Theft Auto 6, and Rockstar‘s newest sequel should finally see the light of day.

With no further delays (we hope), the attention turns more to GTA 6 and how you want to approach it. To do this, let me fill you in on its different editions and what they all offer at different price points.

Every GTA 6 Edition You Can Buy

Right now, GTA 6 has two editions to consider: A base version and a more premium Ultimate Edition.

You know what you’re getting with a normal edition. It’s the core game, but you get some extra pre-order bonuses if you secure your copy before launch—more on this later.

  • More Insider Gaming: GTA 6 Locks Five Single-Player Stores Behind $100 Price-Tag

However, the Ultimate Edition is what many will opt for because of the lavish goodies that come with it. There’s no early access incentive, so you can forget about that. But certain content is locked behind the Ultimate Edition, and it might bother you if you miss out.

All GTA 6 Pre-Order Bonuses

You get quite a few pre-order bonuses with the Grand Theft Auto 6 Vintage Vice City Pack, including a vehicle, outfits and skins, weapon variants, and more.

  • More Insider Gaming: GTA 6 Has Practically No Loading Screens on PS5

We get some nice nods back to the Vice City era with these exclusive goodies, and here’s everything you get:

  • Jason outfit
  • Lucia outfit
  • ’55 Vapid Stanier
  • Weapon Pattern

Again, to get these, you MUST pre-order the game before November 19 to be entitled to them once the full game is out.

All GTA 6 Prices & What’s Included

The base version of GTA 6 costs $80, and if you do want the extra rewards that the Ultimate Edition offers, you need to stump up an extra twenty bucks, taking the cost up to $100.

  • More Insider Gaming: GTA 6 Physical Editions Won’t Include Discs, Just Download Codes

Here’s a quick table showing you what you get with GTA 6 Ultimate Edition and the differences.

There COULD be a Collector’s Edition later on, but you’ll have to keep checking in with us for any updates on a pricier super-duper edition.

Watch GTA 6 Trailer 2 to whet the appetite for the new GTA even more!

Which edition will you buy? Is it worth it? Let us know your guesses through the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, check out the interesting find that GTA 6 is a ‘Single-Player Experience’ with no mention of GTA Online, and don’t forget to sign up for our Insider Gaming Newsletter.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For June 24, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, June 24, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Water formation
  • Hint 2: Often caused by rain
  • Hint 3: Occurs due to uneven flooring

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Splash
  • Sweat
  • Muddy
  • Wet
  • Sand
  • Snow
  • Water
  • Mud
  • Rain

Today’s Contexto Answer For June 24, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Puddle

A Puddle is a pool of liquid on the ground or floor, formed by filling up the holes in uneven surfaces.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on June 25.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Today’s Wordle #1832: Hints and Answer for June 25, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Wordle challenges players to guess a fresh five-letter word each day in six tries or fewer. Whether you’re a beginner or a daily player, today’s tips and strategies can help you solve it faster and maintain your streak—if you’re open to a little extra help. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Wordle, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answer for Wordle Game #1832 for June 25, 2026

To play today’s Wordle, head to the game’s website. If you want to go right to today’s answer without any tips or tricks, you can click right here.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s and yesterday’s editions of Wordle. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Wordle

Wordle is a simple but addictive word puzzle. Each day, players have to guess a five-letter word answer in no more than six attempts. After each guess:

  • Green letters are correct and in the right position.
  • Yellow letters are correct, but in the wrong position.
  • Gray letters are not in the word at all.

The goal is to guess the word in as few tries as possible. Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Wordle can only be played on the New York Times website. There is currently no app for you to download the official game.

Wordle Hints For Today, June 25, 2026

Today’s Wordle answer for game #1832 is a somewhat challenging puzzle. According to the NY Times Wordle review, today’s answer takes an average of 3.8 out of 6 guesses, which is almost a full guess lower than the 4.7-guess average for June 24.

General Wordle Hints For June 25

Without giving today’s Wordle answer completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: It refers to people or things coming together as one.
  • Hint 2: The word is often associated with cooperation, harmony, and shared purpose.
  • Hint 3: It can describe a group working toward a common goal despite differences.
  • Hint 4: You’ll frequently hear it mentioned in speeches, communities, sports teams, and organizations.

Use these clues to narrow down your guesses and increase your chances of solving Wordle #1832 for June 25, 2026.

Starter Words For June 25, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Wordle answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you figure out some included letters. A few starter words that may help are:

  • YOUTH
  • UNTIL
  • STING
  • INPUT
  • COUNT

Today’s Wordle Answer For Game #1832 On June 25, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answer to today’s Wordle below.

Answer: UNITY

If you solved today’s Wordle without our answer, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

What Does Today’s Wordle Answer Mean?

UNITY is a noun that means “the state of being one” or “a whole or totality as combining all its parts into one.”

Yesterday’s Wordle Answer

If you missed the previous game, here’s yesterday’s Wordle answer for Game #1831 on June 24, 2026

Answer: QUEER

While not always the case, looking at previous words can sometimes give you insight into common patterns or letter usage in Wordle puzzles.

When Is The Next Wordle Game After #1832

Wordle games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours before to give players a heads-up. The game on June 26 will be Wordle Game #1833.

What Is Wordle?

Wordle is a daily word puzzle created by Josh Wardle. Initially developed as a prototype in 2013, it wasn’t fully released until 2021. The game challenges players to guess a five-letter word in six tries or fewer, using hints from each attempt to narrow down the answer. Its straightforward concept, accessibility, and the thrill of solving a new puzzle each day helped it surge in popularity by late 2021. The success of Wordle inspired numerous spin-offs and social media challenges, leading to its acquisition by The New York Times in early 2022.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our newsletter.

Mike has been covering the gaming industry since 2012, and has reported on some of the largest events in the industry while also working as an investigative reporter. Outside of…

More from Mike Straw

item.title: You Can Pre-Order GTA 6 Right Now in New Zealand
item.content:encoded:
If you live in New Zealand, I know this is very specific, then you don’t need to wait any longer: You can pre-order GTA 6 right now.

There’s no sneaky New Zealand trick here, before you start asking questions. If you’re based outside of New Zealand, you’ve got a few more hours to wait until you can finally lock in your GTA 6 purchase.

Grand Theft Auto 6 Ready For Pre-Order Now

As you can see here from @GameRoll_, while it’s officially June 24 everywhere else, the time difference means New Zealand gets first dibs on pre-orders!

You can pre-order either the normal edition or the more expensive GTA 6 Ultimate Edition—which includes a lot of stuff, by the way.

  • More Insider Gaming: GTA 6 Has Practically No Loading Screens on PS5

Once you’ve locked in your purchase, you’re all set.

You should be able to preload GTA 6 close to its November 19 release date, and the game we thought would never come out (and still could get delayed, you never know at this point) will be yours.

In the next 24 hours, every other country and region will be able to pre-order GTA 6.

Grand Theft Auto 6’s base edition will cost $80, and you’ll also have a dilemma over the game’s controversial physical edition issue.

  • More Insider Gaming: GTA 6 is a ‘Single-Player Experience’ With No Mention of GTA Online

If you’re not in the right region to pre-order yet, kill some time with GTA 6 Trailer 2.

Will you be pre-ordering GTA 6 as soon as you get the chance? Let us know your guesses through the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more gaming news, check out the interesting find that GTA 6 is a ‘Single-Player Experience’ with no mention of GTA Online, and don’t forget to sign up for our Insider Gaming Newsletter.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.title: GTA 6 Will Be PS5 Pro Enhanced
item.content:encoded:
Grand Theft Auto 6 pre-orders have officially begun rolling out, with New Zealand players among the first to gain access thanks to the region’s midnight launch schedule. As fans pore over the newly updated store pages, one small detail has seemingly confirmed that GTA 6 will be PS5 Pro Enhanced.

The game has already been marketed as ‘Best on PS5,’ with Sony highlighting features such as the DualSense controller and 3D AudioTech as leading factors, with practically no loading screens stealing the show. However, the PS5 Pro version could scale things up to 11, further cementing PlayStation as the best place to play GTA 6.

What Will GTA 6 PS5 Pro Enhancements Look Like?

Images of the updated PlayStation Store page have begun circulating online, and alongside the option to finally pre-order the game, fans have spotted the PS5 Pro Enhanced tag attached to GTA 6.

Exactly what those enhancements entail remains unclear, but based on other PS5 Pro-supported titles, such as Resident Evil 9, players can likely expect improvements to both image quality and performance through PSSR. Many are already hoping the enhanced hardware will allow GTA 6 to achieve a stable 60fps while maintaining near-4K visual fidelity.

With prices rising for the PS5 Pro, if you don’t already have one, it’ll set you back a whopping $900. It’s up to you whether playing GTA 6 in the best possible way is worth that price, but until it comes to PC, that’ll likely be where it plays best.

  • Related: Everything Included In GTA 6 Ultimate Edition & Price

For now, though, Rockstar and Sony have yet to outline the specifics, meaning any discussion around frame rates and graphical upgrades remains speculative until an official announcement is made.

What isn’t speculation is the sheer amount of conversation surrounding the game. Alongside the PS5 Pro news, fans have been debating Rockstar’s decision to lock exclusive single-player content behind the Ultimate Edition, while physical media enthusiasts were disappointed to learn that physical copies of GTA 6 will contain a download code rather than a game disc.

Everyone expected GTA 6 to dominate headlines once pre-orders opened, and that’s exactly what’s happened. With launch day drawing closer and a price now confirmed, it feels like the industry has officially entered the GTA 6 era. Join in with the hype and give the second trailer another view below:

Do you have a PS5 Pro? Where will you be playing GTA 6? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more GTA 6 news, read about the cost of the base game, and don’t forget to sign up for our Newsletter.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion
